title.en: Starmer hints at bank holiday if England win World Cup
title.zh-CN: 如果英格兰赢得世界杯， Starmer暗示银行假期

summary.en: The prime minister says he does not want to "jinx it" but "ask me again if we get to the final".
summary.zh-CN: 总理说他不想“陷入困境” ，而是“再问一次我们是否能进入决赛”。

title.en: Chris Sutton's World Cup quarter-final predictions
title.zh-CN: Chris Sutton的世界杯四分之一决赛预测

summary.en: BBC Sport's football expert Chris Sutton gives his predictions for the quarter-final ties at the 2026 World Cup, including England against Norway.
summary.zh-CN: BBC体育的足球专家克里斯·萨顿（ Chris Sutton ）对2026年世界杯的四分之一决赛进行了预测，其中包括英格兰对挪威的比赛。

title.en: The key World Cup players walking disciplinary tightrope
title.zh-CN: 关键的世界杯球员走纪律钢丝

summary.en: Four England players are at risk of missing a potential World Cup semi-final because of the tournament's yellow-card rules.
summary.zh-CN: 由于比赛的黄牌规则，四名英格兰球员有错过潜在的世界杯半决赛的风险。

title.en: Rashford dilemma for Man Utd - Thursday's gossip
title.zh-CN: 曼联的拉什福德困境-周四的八卦

summary.en: Manchester United are in a quandary over Marcus Rashford's future, Arsenal and Tottenham eye Antonio Nusa, Barcelona shortlist Bournemouth's Eli Junior Kroupi, plus more.
summary.zh-CN: 曼联对马库斯·拉什福德（ Marcus Rashford ）的未来、阿森纳（ Arsenal ）和托特纳姆（ Tottenham ）眼中的安东尼奥·努萨（ Antonio Nusa ）、巴塞罗那入围伯恩茅斯（ Bournemouth ）的伊莱·朱尼尔·克鲁皮

title.en: 'Your boys took a hell of a beating' - England and Norway's football rivalry
title.zh-CN: “你们的男孩被打败了” --英格兰和挪威的足球对抗

summary.en: England's meeting with Norway in the World Cup quarter-final revives memories of a commentary more famous than their rivalry.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队在世界杯四分之一决赛中与挪威队的会面重新唤起了人们对比他们的竞争更着名的评论的记忆。

title.en: Portugal confirm departure of coach Martinez
title.zh-CN: 葡萄牙确认马丁内斯教练离职

summary.en: The Portuguese football federation confirm the departure of national team coach Roberto Martinez, while Rafael Marquez replaces Javier Aguirre as Mexico coach.
summary.zh-CN: 葡萄牙足球联合会确认国家队教练罗伯托·马丁内斯（ Roberto Martinez ）离职，而拉斐尔·马尔克斯（ Rafael Marquez ）取代哈维尔·阿吉雷（ Javier Aguirre ）担任墨西哥教

title.en: The World Cup stars who could have played for England
title.zh-CN: 本可以为英格兰队效力的世界杯球星

summary.en: While there is no shortage of talent in the England squad, a number of World Cup stars from other nations could have featured for the Three Lions if things had worked out differently.
summary.zh-CN: 虽然英格兰队并不缺乏人才，但如果情况有所不同，其他国家的一些世界杯明星本可以为三狮队效力。

title.en: World Cup quiz: Teams to have played the most quarter-finals
title.zh-CN: 世界杯测验：参加四分之一决赛最多的球队

summary.en: With the first World Cup quarter-final taking place tomorrow we've been inspired to make this quiz.
summary.zh-CN: 随着明天的第一届世界杯四分之一决赛的举行，我们受到启发，进行了这次测验。

title.en: Unusual or predictable? How Europe is dominating the World Cup
title.zh-CN: 不寻常或可预测？欧洲如何主导世界杯

summary.en: Six of the eight quarter-finalists at the World Cup in North America are from Europe, so why are they doing so well and what does history tell us about the chances of one of them winning it all?
summary.zh-CN: 在北美世界杯的八名四分之一决赛选手中，有六名来自欧洲，那么他们为什么表现如此出色？历史告诉我们，其中一人赢得这一切的机会是什么？

title.en: Why Newcastle target Manzambi is in demand
title.zh-CN: 为什么纽卡斯尔的目标Manzambi很受欢迎

summary.en: Johan Manzambi has been one of the World Cup's breakout stars, so can Newcastle United win the race to sign the Freiburg midfielder?
summary.zh-CN: 约翰·曼赞比（ Johan Manzambi ）一直是世界杯的突破明星之一，那么纽卡斯尔联队能否赢得签下弗莱堡中场球员的比赛？

title.en: Has World Cup signalled end of chaos at corners?
title.zh-CN: 世界杯是否标志着角落混乱的结束？

summary.en: Can the Premier League learn anything from the refereeing of corners at the World Cup?

title.en: Dalic leaves as Croatia coach after nine years
title.zh-CN: 达利奇在担任克罗地亚教练九年后离职

summary.en: Croatia head coach Zlatko Dalic steps down after nine years in charge following their defeat against Portugal in the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 克罗地亚主教练兹拉特科·达利奇（ Zlatko Dalic ）在世界杯上击败葡萄牙后，在执教九年后辞职。

title.en: How to take a World Cup shootout penalty
title.zh-CN: 如何接受世界杯枪战点球
